Established 2013 | ISO Certified

The Arbutus
Profile.

Introduction

A Decade of Technical Excellence.

Incorporation Date: 20th November 2013

Arbutus Technologies established in 2013, has become leading Indian Professional Distribution Company in the field of Electronic Components and is being managed by a group of professionals having both business and technical expertise with a very structured operation for Foreign & Local Currency Business.

ARBUTUS also provides Ready Reckoner Solutions in different verticals to meet wide customer requirements. ARBUTUS is a One-stop Sourcing and Design Solution provider for electronic products.

We source and stock wide range of electronic components, supporting major semiconductor brands (AD, NXP, Altera, Xilinx, etc.) for both prototype and volume quantities globally.

Arbutus Technologies

A highly specialized technology enterprise delivering excellence through integrated semiconductor sourcing and bespoke embedded engineering.

Corporate HQ

Arbutus
Technologies

STRATEGIC SOURCING

Component Division

Comprehensive sourcing and supply of electronic components with structured Foreign & Local Currency operations.

TECHNICAL INNOVATION

Embedded Design House

Custom engineering and Ready Reckoner Solutions for advanced embedded systems and product design.

How We Work

Business Strategies.

Partnership with Customers and Principals to participate in new product design programs.

Proactive response to Customers' needs with Total Product Solutions.

Complement Sales with Technical support.

Focus on prevailing High end products as well as advanced technology products.

Our Edge

Core Strengths.

Excellent Customers Relationships Management.

Dynamic, experienced and self motivated sales force.

Qualified technical support team.

Team include Engineers having more than 10 years experience in Energy meter segment.

Focused approach for the Market.

Innovation & Engineering

Design &
Development.

We Design embedded and software solutions that make technology seamless. We channel our collective expertise to stretch the limits of technology, understand customers’ needs, and help them get to market faster.

R&D Center

Cutting-edge Hardware & Software Laboratory

Highly specialized & skilled R&D staff.

Technical Capability

Specialized domain knowledge in embedded systems, production, and mechanical products.

Technical Capability

Modern Lab Facility for both Hardware & Software.

Strategic Vision

Future Roadmap.

Outlining our specialized focus and market expansion strategies for the next technical frontier.

01

02

Strategic Pillar
Our Mission

Empowering the Electronics Ecosystem.

"To empower the Indian electronics manufacturing ecosystem through authorized distribution of global standards and high-caliber indigenous engineering services."

2013

Foundation

Company Founded on 20th November 2013 in Bengaluru with a vision to revolutionize component sourcing.

26+

Expertise

Years of Collective Technical & Business Expertise in the electronics industry.
